title: Add formatDate utility function
description: Create a formatDate(date: Date, locale: string): string utility function in src/utils/dateUtils.ts with JSDoc documentation, and co-located unit tests in src/utils/dateUtils.test.ts using vitest. The project is a blank Payload 3.0 template so both files start from scratch. Use Date.prototype.toLocaleDateString for formatting with year, month, and day options.
